mapper.select:
select FIELDID, FIELDNAME,FIELDCHINESENAME,COLUMNNAME,SAMEID,CODEID,codeText,FIELDTYPE, FIELDLEN,wordName,fieldClass,fieldClassCh from( select t.FIELDID as FIELDID, t.FIELDNAME as FIELDNAME, t.FIELDCHINESENAME as FIELDCHINESENAME, t.COLUMNNAME as COLUMNNAME, t.SAMEID as SAMEID, t.CODEID as CODEID, t.codeText as codeText, t.FIELDTYPE as FIELDTYPE, t.FIELDLEN as FIELDLEN, w.wordName, t.FIELD_CLASS as fieldClass, n.valtext as fieldClassCh from (select m.FIELDID, m.FIELDNAME, m.FIELDCHINESENAME, m.COLUMNNAME, m.SAMEID, m.CODEID, m.codeText, m.FIELDTYPE, m.FIELDLEN, m.FIELD_CLASS from (select S.FIELDID,S.FIELDNAME,S.FIELDCHINESENAME,S.COLUMNNAME,S.SAMEID,S.CODEID ,S.FIELDTYPE,S.FIELDLEN, F.codetext ,S.FIELD_CLASS from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD S LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT CODEID,CODETEXT FROM synlte.FIELDCODE) F ON UPPER(S.CODEID) = UPPER(F.CODEID)) m
AND upper(m.fieldId) like upper('%${fieldId}%')
AND upper(m.fieldChineseName) like upper('%${fieldChineseName}%')
AND upper(m.COLUMNNAME) like upper('%${columName}%')
) t left join synlte.SAMEWORD w on UPPER(t.sameid) = UPPER(w.sameid) left join (select valvalue , valtext from synlte.fieldcodeval where codeid='GACODE000414') n on n.valvalue = t.FIELD_CLASS)
order by ${sort} ${sortOrder}
order by FIELDID asc

select tableid,tablename ,objectname as tableNameCh from synlte."OBJECT" o left join synlte.objectfield f on o.objectid = f.objectid where UPPER(f.fieldid) = UPPER(#{fieldId}) and o.DELETED = 0 and upper(o.relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD' and f.deleted = 0 group by tableid,tablename,objectname
